UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Swords card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Swords card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Swords card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Swords card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Swords card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Swords card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the young squire's eagerness, curiosity, and pursuit of knowledge and truth
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the windblown hair or rolling clouds, focusing instead on the active stance and the sword aloft
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Page of Swords card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, flute, percussion, uplifting, hopeful, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Swords card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Swords card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the sly nature of gossip, the chaotic swirl of rumors, and the potential strength hidden within this reversed Page of Swords
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the page's youth or playfulness in this reversed orientation
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Page of Swords card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, flutes, percussion, reversed, introspective, subtle, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Swords card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Page of Swords card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the child scholar's readiness and uncertainty, the sharpness of his mind and the firmness of his resolve.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasising the darkness or unwise nature of the character. Instead, focus on his potential for wisdom and growth.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Page of Swords card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, ethereal, mystical, hopeful, practical, instrumental
